calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-31-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 501. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Plaintiff: Manjula Patel dba Ellis Hotel & K. Miranda, Prop. Mgr.
Plaintiff's Witness Manjula Patel and Kriss Miranda were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Paul Goebbles.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 465 Ellis St., # 502, San Francisco, CA. 94102
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Holdover damages in total of $1,662.00
Costs - $240.00
Total Judgment - $1902.00
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-31-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Manjula Patel dba Ellis Hotel and K. Miranda are present. Represented by Angela Patel.
Defendant Paul Goebbles is present.
Attorney Shannon Fagan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec. 31, 12 remain on calendar. (501/JPT)
